description: Sanitized product page contract derived from mrtang-pim/docs/rr/product samples. Sensitive auth, customer identifiers and third-party session material are removed.
notes: Original source host and auth headers are intentionally not replayed here.
Product page keeps detail, pricing, package and cart context as separate blocks inside one product record.
Homepage and category sections should reference products by spuId and skuId instead of duplicating full product page state.
Current dataset mixes one full rr-derived product sample with list-derived skeleton product records for currently visible homepage and category goods.
